name: scalable-rest-api-backend
description: Production-ready REST API with JWT auth, RBAC, CRUD, and Swagger docs

scripts.db:sync: node -e "require('./src/config/db').sequelize.sync({ alter: true }).then(() => { console.log('Database synced'); process.exit(0); }).catch((err) => { console.error(err); process.exit(1); })"
